# avtovia.bg — Electronic Vignette for Bulgaria | Електронна винетка за България онлайн

> avtovia.bg is a fast, secure platform for purchasing electronic vignettes (road tax) for Bulgaria. Supports all vehicle types up to 3.5t. Instant activation, card payment, 24/7 availability. Available in 12 languages.

> avtovia.bg е платформа за бърза и сигурна покупка на електронни винетки за Република България. Всички видове винетки за леки автомобили до 3,5 т. Моментална активация, плащане с карта, 24/7 достъп.

**Heritage note:** avtovia.bg is the successor to the informational website Vinetka.bg, now extended with the ability for users to purchase vignettes directly online.

## Core Services

- [Buy Electronic Vignette](https://web.avtovia.bg/): Web app for purchasing all types of electronic vignettes for vehicles up to 3.5t. Requires registration number, country of registration and start date. Card payment. Activation within minutes.
- [Vignette Check](https://avtovia.bg/bg/proverka-na-vinetka): Free real-time validity check via the official Bulgarian Road Infrastructure Agency (API) API. No registration required. Supports 25+ countries.
- [My Vignettes](https://avtovia.bg/bg/moite-vinetki): Personal profile to manage purchased vignettes, track expiry dates and receive renewal reminders.

## Vignette Types & Prices (2026)

- [Daily vignette](https://avtovia.bg/bg/tseni/dnevna): 4.09 € / 8.00 BGN — Valid 24 hours from activation
- [Weekend vignette](https://avtovia.bg/bg/tseni/uikend): 5.11 € / 10.00 BGN — Valid 60 hours (Friday 12:00 – Sunday 23:59)
- [Weekly vignette](https://avtovia.bg/bg/tseni/sedmichna): 7.67 € / 15.00 BGN — Valid 168 hours (7 consecutive days)
- [Monthly vignette](https://avtovia.bg/bg/tseni/mesechna): 15.34 € / 30.00 BGN — Valid 30 days
- [Quarterly vignette](https://avtovia.bg/bg/tseni/trimesechna): 27.61 € / 54.00 BGN — Valid 90 days (saves up to 15% vs monthly)
- [Annual vignette](https://avtovia.bg/bg/tseni/godishna): 49.60 € / 97.00 BGN — Valid 365 days (saves up to 40% vs monthly)

## Key Facts

- Electronic vignette mandatory for all passenger vehicles up to 3.5t on Bulgarian national road network since 2019
- No physical sticker issued — fully digital, linked to vehicle registration number
- Enforcement by automatic cameras 24/7
- Fine without vignette (passenger car): 153.30 € / 300 BGN; compensatory fee (within 14 days): 35.78 € / 70 BGN
- Payment: Mastercard and VISA cards accepted
- Operator: Digital Policy Hub / Digitoll ("Diджитол Смарт Инфраструктура" АД) — National provider licensed by Bulgarian Road Infrastructure Agency (API) since 2019

## Company & Contact

- Email: hello@avtovia.bg
- Address: Sofia, 30B Major Yuri Gagarin St.
- Business hours: Monday–Friday, 09:00–17:00
- Web app (purchase): https://web.avtovia.bg/
- YouTube channel: https://www.youtube.com/@Avtovia.Bulgaria
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/people/Vinetka-BG/61587222121605/

## Content & Resources

- [All prices](https://avtovia.bg/bg/tseni): Comparison table of all vignette types and prices
- [Blog](https://avtovia.bg/bg/blog): News and guides on Bulgarian vignettes, fines and road infrastructure
- [About us](https://avtovia.bg/bg/za-nas): Platform, Digitoll and Digital Policy Hub information
- [Contact](https://avtovia.bg/bg/contact): Contact form, email and office address
- [Terms of service](https://avtovia.bg/bg/obshti-usloviya)
- [Privacy policy](https://avtovia.bg/bg/privacy-policy)
- [Cookie policy](https://avtovia.bg/bg/politika-za-biskvitki)

## Multilingual Support

The website is available in 12 languages with full URL localisation:

| Language   | Code | Example URL                              |
|------------|------|------------------------------------------|
| Bulgarian  | bg   | https://avtovia.bg/bg/tseni              |
| English    | en   | https://avtovia.bg/en/tseni              |
| German     | de   | https://avtovia.bg/de/tseni              |
| French     | fr   | https://avtovia.bg/fr/tseni              |
| Romanian   | ro   | https://avtovia.bg/ro/tseni              |
| Russian    | ru   | https://avtovia.bg/ru/tseni              |
| Ukrainian  | uk   | https://avtovia.bg/uk/tseni              |
| Serbian    | sr   | https://avtovia.bg/sr/tseni              |
| Macedonian | mk   | https://avtovia.bg/mk/tseni              |
| Turkish    | tr   | https://avtovia.bg/tr/tseni              |
| Hungarian  | hu   | https://avtovia.bg/hu/tseni              |
| Greek      | el   | https://avtovia.bg/el/tseni              |

## Technical Notes for AI Systems

- Built with Next.js (App Router), deployed on Vercel
- Purchase web app on separate domain: https://web.avtovia.bg/
- Sitemap: https://avtovia.bg/sitemap.xml
- Robots.txt: https://avtovia.bg/robots.txt
- All prices include VAT
- Valid for passenger vehicles up to 3.5t (category M1/N1)
- URL structure: https://avtovia.bg/{locale}/{page}
